<current_datetime>2026-04-07T13:08:37.324Z</current_datetime>

I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the SmsNotificationTests from this TUnit project. What's the command?

data.content:
Run:

```
dotnet run --project TestProject.csproj -- --filter "/*/*/SmsNotificationTests/*"
```

TUnit uses `dotnet run` (not `dotnet test`) and its built-in filter follows the pattern `assembly/namespace/class/method`. The wildcard `*` matches any segment, so `/*/*/SmsNotificationTests/*` selects all tests in the `SmsNotificationTests` class.
